basic_details.job_title: ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 1 Senior Research Fellow Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on 24-07-2026 at the ANGRAU office with original documents and self-attested copies. In this article, you'll find the Senior Research Fellow walk-in recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, walk-in venue and timing, documents required, and direct links to the official notification.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Men: Not exceeding 35 years, Women: Not exceeding 40 years
age_limit.details: Men: Not exceeding 35 years Women: Not exceeding 40 years

qualification.details: M.Sc. (Ag. Economics.) M.Sc. (Ag.Statistics.) 4 years of Bachelor's Degree from ICAR accredited University.

salary_details.details: Rs.37000/- + HRA per month The HRA will be given as per the existing state Govt. rates applicable in various places/ locations

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ANGRAU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Senior Research Fellow position at ANGRAU?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 24th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they are present at the venue on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Ag. Economics or M.Sc. in Ag. Statistics, along with a 4-year Bachelor's Degree from an ICAR accredited University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as per state government rates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for male and female candidates applying for this post?
faq.answer: For male candidates, the age limit is not exceeding 35 years. For female candidates, the age limit is not exceeding 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Research Fellow position announced by Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Eligible candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the ANGRAU office in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh. The exact venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring their Bio-data, original and self-attested Xerox copies of educational qualifications, and other relevant documents, along with a passport-size photograph.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.
